Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xB191 "STRANGELOOP-B191" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Strangeloop.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
To allow the dump to start from $0400, the following changes were made:
1. A small routine at $02A7 was moved to $9A80 instead. 2. The JSR $02A7 instruction at $FADC was changed to JSR $9A80 instead.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
